rationale: Operational immediately, but KPI movement usually becomes visible after about 4+ quarters.

kpi: Net Migration Flow of AI Skills; Tortoise Talent Score

kpi: AI Investment Activity; Tortoise Commercial Score

rationale: Commercial traction typically appears after funding is deployed and customer traction compounds.

rationale: Patent and R&D effects are delayed; patent grant timing alone averages about 2.5 years after examination request.
